printed.name: Corkscrew Advanced
printed.setup: Starting in Roll Over position (page 59), legs overhead

movement.inhale: Rotate spine, moving legs to one side
movement.exhale: Roll down side of trunk, circle legs around, rotate spine, roll up opposite side of trunk, rotate spine, moving legs to center, return to start position

cues: Move legs and pelvis as one unit
Avoid lowering legs beyond diagonal line
Initiate rotation to side and back to center with abdominals
